---
title: "The Body: el límite entre el ruido y la música"
# subtitle: ""
date: "2026-03-20"
draft: true
categories: [música]
---
  
::: {.playlist .centrar}
<iframe allow="autoplay *; encrypted-media *; fullscreen *; clipboard-write" frameborder="0" height="450" style="width:100%;overflow:hidden;border-radius:10px;" sandbox="allow-forms allow-popups allow-same-origin allow-scripts allow-storage-access-by-user-activation allow-top-navigation-by-user-activation" src="https://embed.music.apple.com/cl/playlist/favs-the-body/pl.u-mJy8y9JuBAM8JK"></iframe>
:::
